steps.t: The skull trophy is located in Rung-shakam. You should steal the skull trophy.
The den of Nazdrau can be found in western Azanulbizar. You should plant the skull trophy before Nazdrau's den.
The den of Sulthrug can be found in western Azanulbizar. You should plant the skull trophy before Sulthrug's den.
Valdi can be found in Amdân. You should return to Valdi.
